name: Aqua Chorus Round
name_jp: アクアの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>輪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>唱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Banish 1 card from your hand, and if you do, during your next Standby Phase, you can add up to 2 cards with the same name as that banished card from your Deck to your hand. If you activated this card while your opponent controlled no cards, for the rest of this turn you cannot activate cards, or the effects of cards, with the same original name as that banished card.
eff: Banish 1 card from your hand, and if you do, during your next Standby Phase, you can add up to 2 cards with the same name as that banished card from your Deck to your hand. If you activated this card while your opponent controlled no cards, for the rest of this turn you cannot activate cards, or the effects of cards, with the same original name as that banished card.

mst: Prevents activation of your Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your Trap Cards
